title: Velvety Sweet Northern Irish Beetroot Bake
description: A comforting, creamy dish from Northern Ireland featuring cooked beetroot, perfect for a cozy meal or snack.
instructions: Peel and chop the beetroot into 2cm (¾ inch) cubes.
In a medium saucepan, melt the butter over low heat.
Add the flour and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly, to make a roux.
Gradually add the milk, whisking continuously, and bring to a simmer.
Add the baking powder and salt, and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the sauce thickens.
Add the cooked beetroot, brown sugar, eggs, and plain yogurt to the saucepan and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a greased 20cm (8 inch) round baking dish or wooden board.
Drizzle the honey over the top and sprinkle with fresh thyme.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the edges are set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10-15 minutes before serving.
